title: How to Use Prospecting Free Tier in GoHighLevel Sub-Accounts
description: Learn how to use GoHighLevel's Prospecting Free Tier in sub-accounts to find, qualify, and automate outreach to leads. Step-by-step setup guide inside.
html_content:
Running a marketing agency means juggling multiple client accounts, lead pipelines, and conversion workflows—all while keeping costs down. If you've been manually searching for prospects or paying for separate lead generation tools, you're leaving money on the table. The good news? GoHighLevel's Prospecting Free Tier brings lead discovery, qualification, and outreach into your sub-accounts at zero extra cost.

In this guide, I'll walk you through exactly how to access, set up, and leverage the Prospecting Free Tier in your GoHighLevel sub-accounts—so you can generate and qualify leads without upgrading to Premium or switching platforms. You'll see why thousands of agencies now run their entire business on one platform.

Ready to try it yourself? Start your free 30-day trial here—you get double the standard 14-day trial, with no credit card required.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Is GoHighLevel Prospecting?
  • How to Access Prospecting Free Tier in Sub-Accounts
  • Core Features Available at the Free Tier
  • Step-by-Step Setup for Your First Prospect Campaign
  • Free vs. Premium Prospecting: What's the Difference?
  • Best Practices for Maximizing Free Prospecting Results

What Is GoHighLevel Prospecting?

GoHighLevel's Prospecting tool is built to automate and simplify lead generation without requiring you to leave the platform. Instead of juggling multiple tools, you can:

  • Find and evaluate leads using business data and AI-powered filters
  • Generate marketing audit reports for each prospect, showcasing gaps in their current marketing presence
  • Use this data to upsell services and demonstrate your agency's value immediately
  • Automate outreach sequences to move prospects from discovery to first conversation
  • Track and nurture leads inside the same CRM where you manage your clients

The Free Tier gives you access to the core prospecting workflow. You can search for qualified business prospects, pull their contact information, and begin automated outreach—all without paying extra per lead or per contact.

How to Access Prospecting Free Tier in Sub-Accounts

The Prospecting Free Tier is activated automatically in your GoHighLevel sub-accounts once your agency account is set up. Here's how to confirm it's active and ready to use:

  1. Log into your agency dashboard. Use your main agency account credentials.
  2. Navigate to the sub-account where you want to run prospecting campaigns. Click "Switch Account" or select the sub-account from your dashboard.
  3. Go to the Prospecting module. In the left sidebar, locate "Prospecting" or "Lead Generation." It may be listed under "Sales" or "CRM" depending on your GHL version.
  4. Verify Free Tier access. You should see the prospecting dashboard with lead search filters active. No Premium badge or upgrade prompt should block access to core features.
  5. Start your first search. Use the business filters (industry, location, company size, revenue range) to find qualified prospects in your target market.

Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 Days

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

Core Features Available at the Free Tier

The Free Tier isn't a stripped-down version—it includes the essential tools you need to find, qualify, and begin outreach to warm prospects:

  • Business Lead Database Search: Filter by industry, location, company size, revenue, employee count, and more. The database includes millions of verified business contacts.
  • Lead Qualification Data: Each prospect record includes contact name, email, phone, website, social profiles, and firmographic data to help you prioritize outreach.
  • Marketing Audit Reports: Generate automated reports showing gaps in a prospect's current marketing—SEO, social media, website, paid advertising, email presence. Use these reports as conversation starters.
  • CRM Integration: Save prospects directly to your sub-account CRM. Create custom tags, notes, and pipeline stages for each lead.
  • Bulk Export: Export lists of prospects as CSV files to use in your outreach workflows or external tools (though keeping everything in GHL is recommended).
  • Automation Sequences: Once a prospect is in your CRM, trigger automated email and SMS sequences to nurture them toward a first conversation.

💡 Pro Tip

The marketing audit report is one of the most underutilized features in the Free Tier. Generate a custom report for each prospect and include it in your first outreach email. It positions you as an authority and gives prospects a concrete reason to respond—you've already identified gaps they didn't know existed.

Step-by-Step Setup for Your First Prospect Campaign

Let's build a real prospecting workflow from scratch. Here's the fastest path from your first search to active outreach:

Step 1: Define Your Target Prospect Profile
Before you search, write down the ideal prospect: industry, company size, location, revenue range. For example: "Digital marketing agencies, 5-50 employees, in the US, $1M-$10M annual revenue." This focus saves time and improves conversion rates.

Step 2: Run Your First Prospect Search
In Prospecting, enter your filters and run the search. You'll see a list of matching businesses. Click on individual prospects to view detailed contact information and firmographic data.

Step 3: Generate Marketing Audit Reports
For your top 10-20 prospects, generate marketing audit reports. These reports highlight specific gaps in their digital presence. Save these reports or note the key findings—you'll reference them in outreach.

Step 4: Add Prospects to Your CRM
Use the "Add to CRM" button to move qualified prospects into your sub-account's contact database. Organize them with a tag like "Warm Prospect - Outreach Ready" so your team knows they're ready for follow-up.

Step 5: Create an Automation Sequence
In the Automation section, build a simple 3-5 email sequence that: (1) Introduces your agency, (2) References the marketing audit findings, (3) Offers a free consultation, (4) Follows up with a case study, (5) Final breakup email. Set the sequence to trigger when a contact is tagged.

Step 6: Monitor and Adjust
Track opens, clicks, and replies. After 2-3 weeks, review which email subjects and angles drove the most engagement, then refine your next batch.

Free vs. Premium Prospecting: What's the Difference?

Understanding the limits of the Free Tier helps you work smarter and know when (if ever) to upgrade:

Feature Free Tier Premium
Lead Database Access ✓ Full access ✓ Full access
Monthly Lead Credits Limited (typically 50-100) Higher allowance
Marketing Audit Reports ✓ Included ✓ Included
Advanced Filters ✓ Standard filters ✓ Advanced targeting
CRM Integration ✓ Yes ✓ Yes
Bulk Export ✓ Limited exports ✓ Unlimited exports

For most agencies starting out, the Free Tier is more than enough to qualify leads and begin conversations. You can always upgrade to Premium later if you need higher volume or advanced filtering.

Best Practices for Maximizing Free Prospecting Results

1. Focus on Quality Over Quantity
Don't just search for every business in your area. Use tight filters to find prospects that match your ideal client profile. A smaller list of highly qualified leads will convert better than a massive list of poor fits.

2. Personalize Your Outreach
Reference the prospect's actual business, website, or recent activity in your first email. Generic templates get ignored. The marketing audit report is your personalization shortcut.

3. Use Sub-Account Separation Strategically
If you run multiple service lines (e.g., SEO for local businesses and web design for e-commerce), create separate sub-accounts and run separate prospecting campaigns. This keeps data clean and allows you to specialize your messaging.

4. Track Your Metrics
Monitor email open rates, click-through rates, and reply rates for each automation sequence. A/B test subject lines and send times. The data will tell you what's working.

5. Combine Prospecting with Your Existing Clients
Use the CRM to track both prospects and active clients in the same place. This visibility helps you spot upsell opportunities and keeps your entire business funnel transparent.

6. Don't Waste Credits on Bad Timing
If you're testing your outreach message, start with 10-15 prospects before scaling to 50+. You'll learn what works before burning through your monthly credits.

The Bottom Line

The Prospecting Free Tier in GoHighLevel removes one of the biggest barriers for growing agencies: finding and qualifying leads without external tools or extra expense. You get access to a verified business database, AI-powered audit reports, CRM integration, and automation—all inside your sub-account, with no hidden fees.

By following the setup steps and best practices above, you can move from prospect discovery to first conversation in days, not weeks. The platform does the heavy lifting; your team focuses on closing deals.

If you haven't already, start your free 30-day trial and test it yourself. You'll see why prospecting inside your CRM beats switching between tools every time.
